title: mariscus tanyphyllus
intro: Mariscus tanyphyllus, also known as the broad-leaved sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Mariscus tanyphyllus include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Mariscus tanyphyllus can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
